patch.value: CI: cache vitest/.cache + tsbuildinfo for incremental builds + faster tests

vitest writes a cache directory that speeds up subsequent runs; tsc supports incremental builds via tsconfig {composite/incremental:true} writing .tsbuildinfo. Cache both with actions/cache@v5 keyed on lockfile + source hash so warm CI is 30-50% faster. Today every CI run starts cold.

actions/cache restores .tsbuildinfo and vitest cache on warm runs; tsconfig has incremental:true; second consecutive CI run measurably faster than first; cache key invalidates on lockfile or source changes.
